alerts.title: Leaked MoU terms: 60-day ceasefire, Iran to clear Hormuz mines, US to lift naval blockade
alerts.summary: Middle East Spectator, citing Axios, lists detailed terms of the emerging US-Iran Memorandum of Understanding: a 60-day ceasefire extension, reopening of the Strait of Hormuz with no tolls, US lifting its naval blockade on Iranian ports, Iranian mine-clearing operations, Tehran committing to negotiations on suspending enrichment and removing its HEU stockpile, a pledge never to pursue nuclear weapons, and US sanctions waivers allowing Iranian oil sales. Post drew ~43K views and represents the most granular leak of deal text to date.

alerts.title: Russia strikes Kyiv with 'Tsirkon' hypersonics and 'Oreshnik' IRBM in overnight barrage
alerts.summary: Rybar reports that the night of 24 May saw one of the most sustained strikes on Kyiv to date, with Tsirkon hypersonic cruise missiles and the Oreshnik intermediate-range ballistic missile employed against aviation-repair and industrial targets. Follow-on Rybar post (~108K views) confirms strikes also hit Sumy, Cherkasy, Dnipropetrovsk regions and an oil depot in Myrhorod, with energy and transport nodes targeted.

alerts.title: NATO rehearses deep strikes into Russia in 'Arcade Strike' exercise from London bunker
alerts.summary: DeepState UA (~197K views) reports NATO's Allied Rapid Reaction Corps (ARRC) stood up a headquarters in a mothballed platform of Charing Cross Underground station to wargame deep strikes on Russia in response to a simulated attack on a Baltic ally. Exercise tested EW, comms suppression and counter-drone operations, signaling NATO's posture for an Article 5 Baltic contingency.

alerts.title: Israeli officials and GOP hawks brand emerging Iran deal a 'nightmare' and 'bad deal'
alerts.summary: The Jerusalem Post quotes Israeli officials labeling the emerging US-Iran agreement a 'bad deal,' while Middle East Eye and PBS report Republican hawks attacking Trump's framework as a 'nightmare for Israel.' The New York Times notes Netanyahu has been reduced from 'co-pilot' to 'passenger,' and US sentiment shows a 57% negative skew with 'criticism,' 'GOP,' and 'lawmakers' surging in the word cloud — signaling domestic political risk to the framework.

alerts.title: Israeli strikes kill infant, 13-year-old, and five Gaza police; Nabatieh facility destroyed
alerts.summary: Reuters, Al Jazeera and The National report Israeli strikes in central Gaza killed a six-month-old boy and his parents, while a separate strike killed a 13-year-old and five police officers. The Times of Israel confirms Lebanon's civil defense facility in Nabatieh was destroyed in an IDF strike (personnel evacuated), and The Guardian documents continued Israeli bombardment reducing buildings to craters in southern Lebanon — indicating the Israel-Lebanon track remains hot even as Iran diplomacy advances.

analysis_note: US-Iran diplomacy has moved from 'agreement in principle' to leaked operational text (60-day ceasefire, mine-clearing, sanctions waivers), but Israeli and GOP-hawk backlash threatens ratification even as Russia escalates hypersonic strikes on Kyiv and NATO openly rehearses deep-strike contingencies.
